name: Donahue Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In an electric mixer bowl, combine the cake mix and instant lemon pudding.
3. In a measuring cup, mix lemon juice with enough cold water to make 2/3 cup. Add eggs, the lemon/water mixture, and lemon extract to the dry ingredients. Combine thoroughly.
4. Pour in oil and beat at medium speed for 6 minutes or until smooth.
5. Lightly oil a Bundt pan, pour in the batter, and bake for 45 minutes or until the top is golden and the cake springs back when touched.
6. While the cake bakes, prepare the glaze: Whisk lemon juice, zest, lemon extract, and confectioners' sugar together until smooth.
7. When the cake is done, let it cool for 5 minutes. Invert and unmold.
8. Pierce the top of the cake with 1-inch deep holes using a poultry needle or toothpick. Drizzle the glaze over the cake.
9. Serve with fresh berries if desired.
Serves 10
